tuning: E A D G B E
content:
In standard Tuning Eadgbe, the exact chords he's playing are [ch]C[/ch], [ch]G#[/ch], [ch]D#[/ch], [ch]A#[/ch], 
[tab]but to make it easier, just put a capo on the 1st fret and play [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]D[/ch], [ch]A[/ch].  
You get much nicer chords and won't have to play Sharps. This song is the [/tab]
same FOUR CHORDS over and over again.  The Chords will probably not end 
up right over the correct place cause Ultimate Guitar changes the font, which
changes the position of the Chords.

Chords Used [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]D[/ch] , [ch]A[/ch]

[Intro]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] 
         Everybody's looking for love. Oh. Oh.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] 
Ain't that the reason you're at this club. Oh. Oh.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] 
You ain't gonna find it dancin' with him. No. OAh.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] 
I got a better solution for you girl. Oh. Oh.[/tab]

[Pre-Hook]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch] 
Just stay with me now. Say the word and well go.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch] 
I'll be your teacher. I'll show you the ropes.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch] 
You'll see a side of love you've never known.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch] 
I can see it going down, going down.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch] 
In my head, I see you all over me.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch] 
In my head, you fulfill my fantasy.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch] 
In my head ,you'll be screaming no.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                   
In my head, it's going down.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
In my head, it's going down.[/tab]

In my head. Yeah.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] 
In my head. Oh yeah.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
Some dudes know all the right things to say.
When it comes down to it, its just a game.
Instead of talking let me demonstrate. Yeah.
Get down to business lets skip foreplay.

[Pre-Hook]
Just leave with me now. Say the word and well go.
Ill be your teacher. Ill show you the ropes.
You'll see a side of love you've never known.
I can see it going down, going down.

Break it down. Ay-oh. Come on. Ay-oh. Ay-oh.
You singing to me baby in my head right now. Ay-oh. Ay-oh. Come on.
Shell be screaming out when it all goes down.
